prompt: Create a magazine cover for {argument name="magazine name" default=""COSTAKONAR""} magazine in a street art, fashion, and rebellious culture style. Use the attached photo as the man's face – strictly preserve all facial features: eyes, lips, hair color, ears, shape of the face. No changes, no hallucinations. The man is young, confident, with a defiant expression. He wears an oversized hoodie, baggy cargo pants, high-top sneakers, and a backward baseball cap. His hands are in his pockets or making a rock gesture. Pose is relaxed but bold, positioned slightly off-center left. Background: a chaotic collage of graffiti, stencils, stickers, newspaper clippings, abstract paint splashes and drips. There is no skull. Instead, add life-affirming elements such as small urban flowers, flying birds, street signs, or colorful abstract shapes. Overlay the following Cyrillic text exactly: "УЛИЧНОЕ ИСКУССТВО ★ МОДА ★ КУЛЬТУРА", large grunge font "COSTAKONAR", "ВЫПУСК 26 МАЯ 2026", "РОЖДЁННЫЙ ВЫДЕЛЯТЬСЯ", "НАРУШАЙ ПРАВИЛА", "БУДУЩЕЕ ЗА НАМИ", "УЛИЧНЫЙ СТИЛЬ ЗАХВАТЫВАЕТ", "ГРАНИЦЫ", "+ ЭКСКЛЮЗИВНОЕ ИНТЕРВЬЮ АРТ × МОДА КРЕАТОРЫ НОВОГО ПОКОЛЕНИЯ", "ЗАЯВИ О СЕБЕ", and at the bottom "КРАСНОДАР". Colors: neon pink, vibrant orange, black, white. Distressed textures, paint drips, dynamic lighting, harsh shadows, gritty urban feel. Composition: text on top and right, man on left, "КРАСНОДАР" at bottom. Preserve the face from the uploaded image exactly – no alterations.
